member.name: T:SharpGuard.Reporting.IReportWriter
member.summary: Strategy interface for writing analysis reports in various formats.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Reporting.IReportWriter.Format
member.summary: The output format this writer produces.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Reporting.IReportWriter.WriteAsync(SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportContext,System.IO.TextWriter,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes the analysis report to the given .

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportContext
member.summary: Data bag containing all analysis results to be rendered by a report writer.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportContext.ProjectPath
member.summary: Path to the project or solution that was analyzed.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportContext.AnalysisStartTime
member.summary: Timestamp when the analysis started.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportContext.Duration
member.summary: Total duration of the analysis.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportContext.SastFindings
member.summary: All SAST findings discovered.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportContext.ScaResults
member.summary: All SCA vulnerability results.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportContext.SeverityThreshold
member.summary: Minimum severity threshold applied during analysis.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportContext.IsOffline
member.summary: Whether the analysis ran in offline mode.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportContext.ToolVersion
member.summary: Tool version string.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportFormat
member.summary: Output formats supported by the reporting engine.

member.name: F:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportFormat.Console
member.summary: Human-readable colored console output.

member.name: F:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportFormat.Json
member.summary: Machine-readable JSON.

member.name: F:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportFormat.Sarif
member.summary: SARIF v2.1.0 for GitHub Code Scanning / Azure DevOps.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportWriterFactory
member.summary: Factory that selects the appropriate for a given format.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportWriterFactory.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{SharpGuard.Reporting.IReportWriter})
member.summary: Creates the factory with all available report writers.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportWriterFactory.GetWriter(SharpGuard.Reporting.ReportFormat)
member.summary: Returns the report writer for the specified format.
member.exception: Thrown if no writer is registered for the format.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Reporting.Writers.ConsoleReportWriter
member.summary: Writes analysis results to the console with color-coded severity levels.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Reporting.Writers.JsonReportWriter
member.summary: Writes analysis results as machine-readable JSON.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Reporting.Writers.SarifReportWriter
member.summary: Writes analysis results in SARIF v2.1.0 format for GitHub Code Scanning and Azure DevOps.
